title: The First Snowman
synopsis: Two children rush outside after the first snow of winter and build a snowman together.
sentences: Ella woke up and ran to the window with a small gasp.
The garden, the road, and the rooftops were all white.
It was the first snow of the winter.
She called her brother, and both children hurried into warm coats and gloves.
Outside, the snow felt soft and quiet under their boots.
They rolled a small snowball until it became a large round body.
Then they made another ball for the middle and one more for the head.
Their father helped lift the top piece into place.
Ella found two buttons for eyes, and her brother added a carrot nose.
A scarf around the snowman's neck made him look proud and cheerful.
Before going back inside, the children stood beside their snowman for a picture.
All day long, they smiled every time they looked out the window.
